function.name: write
function.description:
Create a new file with content. File must not exist. Use 'update' for existing files.

- Use this to create brand new files only
- Will error if file already exists (use 'update' tool instead)
- Requires user approval before writing
- Shows preview of content before creating file
- Automatically creates parent directories if needed

file_path.description: Path to new file (relative or absolute)
